test.details: 3 test files, 40 tests passed (gtin: 20, did: 11, auth: 9)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that the test-first (red-green) approach applies to packages with testable logic (e.g., shared libraries), not to pure infrastructure scaffolding features (e.g., monorepo config files, CI YAML). For config-only features, validation via commands (pnpm install, build) is the appropriate verification strategy.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both monorepo-setup and ci-pipeline workers noted that writing tests first doesn't apply to config scaffolding. The monorepo-setup worker explicitly flagged this in their skill feedback.
